steps.title: Recall the area formula for a square
steps.content: For a square with side length $s$, the area is found by multiplying the side length by itself.

steps.title: Apply the given side length
steps.content:
The solar sail has side length $8.75w$ meters. Substituting this into the area formula gives us:
$$A = (8.75w)(8.75w)$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
